task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of 'transit_app_prd.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open the draw.io application to create the wireframe
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the draw.io (diagrams.net) application open, working on the 'transit_app_wireframe.drawio' file.

task_completion.description: Create five distinct mobile app screens
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of 5 distinct mobile screen frames on the canvas or 5 page tabs created in draw.io, corresponding to Home, Trip Planner, Route Results, Route Detail, and Alerts.

task_completion.description: Add UI components and required text labels
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of UI elements (buttons, headers, lists) added to the screens, containing required text labels such as 'Plan Trip', 'Search Routes', 'Service Alerts', 'Main St', or 'Bus 42'.
Visual evidence of connection lines or arrows drawn between different screens or UI elements to indicate user navigation flows.

task_completion.description: Export the completed wireframe as a PNG
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of the draw.io export dialog saving the file as a PNG, or a file manager/terminal showing 'transit_app_wireframe.png' successfully created in the Diagrams folder.

integrity.description: Agent used the draw.io GUI to build the wireframe
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the draw.io graphical interface to drag and drop shapes, rather than using a script to generate the XML/drawio file.
The agent manually added shapes, text, and lines in draw.io, rather than importing a pre-made image or template of the entire wireframe.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The PNG file was exported using draw.io's built-in export functionality, not by downloading an external image or renaming a different file type.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The PRD specifies exactly 5 screens: Home, Trip Planner, Route Results, Route Detail, and Alerts. The wireframe must include specific text labels: 'plan trip', 'recent trips', 'search routes', 'available routes', 'save trip', 'service alerts', 'main st', and 'bus 42'. The final output must be exported as a PNG to /home/ga/Diagrams/transit_app_wireframe.png.
